CheckTitle: Ensure no root account access key exists
Description: The root account should not have access keys.
Risk: Root account access keys provide unrestricted access.

Recommendation.Text: Delete the root account access keys and use IAM users instead.

CheckTitle: Ensure CloudTrail is enabled in all regions
Description: CloudTrail is not enabled in all regions.
Risk: Malicious activity may go undetected in uncovered regions.

CheckTitle: Ensure all S3 buckets have encryption enabled
